title: Create: Invisible Goggles
description: Makes Create’s goggles on your head invisible, so you can see your face again
body:
## Description
This resourcepack makes the texture of Create's goggles transparent, because I think they're ugly. That's espacially useful when you play in multiplayer, so you can see each other's faces again. Only the model on your head is removed, you can still see the goggles normally in your inventory.
